name: population-and-development-review-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at Population and Development Review (PDR), the Population Council's quarterly journal published by Wiley at the intersection of demography and development.

plugins.name: population-and-development-review-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Population and Development Review (PDR) manuscript lifecycle across the demography-and-development intersection, with demographic methods (life tables, decomposition, event history, age-period-cohort, projections), synthetic-essay craft, double-anonymized review, Free Format ScholarOne submission, and no author fees under the standard model.
